title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: Tutorial demonstrating ImagineArt Film Studio for creating AI-generated short films with consistent character appearance across multiple scenes. The tool addresses character consistency drift through storyboard mode, multi-shot generation with camera presets, and built-in timeline editing capabilities, enabling complete film creation within a single browser interface.
